project.final_object_type: analytic method or human-AI evaluation module
project.next_production_action: Maintain regression, reviewer, and deployment evidence; no blocking action recorded.

evidence_file_plan.purpose: Captures the non-sample case used for calibration.
Captures observed output from the project instrument.
Records clearly labeled review or technical audit before promotion.

execution_steps: Run the project against at least one live or non-sample case.
Record expected behavior, observed behavior, and any calibration drift.
Add a reviewer note assessing whether the result is reliable enough for public claims.
